blended.narrative: Eldora is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,247 ft. Strong winds with gusts to 46 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 47°F, gusts to 46 mph.
Tomorrow: 3.0" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: dry, highs of 45°F, winds around 21 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 9" over the past week. Current depth: 33".
